name: GitHub Copilot Pro for Open Source Maintainers
description: GitHub provides free Copilot Pro access to maintainers of popular open-source repositories, enabling AI-assisted coding at no cost.

perks.title: Free GitHub Copilot Pro
perks.description: Full access to GitHub Copilot Pro for AI-powered code completion, chat, and suggestions.

eligibility: Must be a maintainer of a popular open-source repository on GitHub.
Repository must meet GitHub's popularity/activity thresholds.
applicationProcess: Eligible maintainers are automatically identified by GitHub.
